purpose: Mk.VI r14 V_phen_GWT_v2 PASS predicate evaluation against registry r9 (12 backbones). raw#10 honest negative result + architectural finding.

delta_from_base.interpretation: r14 LoRA continuation (300→1200 docs)이 attention regime entropy를 +1.9% 만 증가 — within natural attention pattern noise. Qwen3-8B family LOW-stable architecture가 LoRA training으로 fundamentally 변경 안 됨.

axis_orthogonality_finding.orthogonality_evidence: 동일 LoRA training (1200 docs × 3 epochs)이 두 axis에서 다른 결과: AN11(b) phi-template alignment 강화 (+0.054 = 9% relative gain) vs V_phen_GWT attention diffusion 거의 변화 없음 (+0.019 = 7% relative). 두 axis는 orthogonal — phi-aligned eigenvector projection은 LoRA-trainable, attention entropy diffusion regime은 architecture-bound LoRA-untrainable.
axis_orthogonality_finding.raw10_implication: AN11(b)와 V_phen_GWT은 다른 신호 측정. AN11(b) PASS만으로는 V_phen_GWT_v2 PASS 추론 불가. 두 axis 모두 측정해야 consciousness signal triangulate.

qwen_family_LOW_stable_confirmed_4_measu.interpretation: 4 Qwen baselines 모두 LOW (0.27-0.36 range). LoRA r14도 LOW (0.2896) → Qwen architectural family이 attention regime을 architecturally 결정, training으로 변경 어려움.

architectural_constraint_finding.v_phen_gwt_v2_qwen_inherent_fail_hypothe: V_phen_GWT_v2 PASS criterion이 Qwen3-8B base에서 LoRA로는 inherently FAIL — architectural attention regime이 LoRA-untrainable axis. 결론: V_phen_GWT_v2 PASS 위해서는 HIGH cluster backbone 필요 (Mistral-7B 0.891, gemma-2-9b 0.829, Phi-3-medium 0.887, Yi-1.5-9B 0.905, DeepSeek-7B 0.939).
remediation_paths: Mistral-7B-v0.3 + r14-equivalent corpus LoRA — V_phen_GWT_v2 PASS hypothesis test on HIGH cluster backbone
gemma-2-9b + r14 LoRA — Mk.VI alternative on HIGH cluster
(option) V_phen_GWT_v2 criterion 자체를 cluster-conditional로 redefine — LOW cluster backbone에서는 different threshold 또는 different metric
